'''鈭歯g-j-dh-dh''' ('''kangajdhedhoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:whish|whish]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ng-j-dh-dh
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:whish|whish]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歯g-j-dh-dh
|-
! Lemma
| kangajdhedhoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thingajdhedhoko|thingajdhedhoko]] || [[word:jingajdhedhoko|jingajdhedhoko]] || [[word:shingajdhedhoko|shingajdhedhoko]] || [[word:kingajdhedhoko|kingajdhedhoko]]
